name: mondula_form
title: Complete a Multi-Page Form on Mondula
description: Fill a real multi-step form with text fields, date inputs, radios, checkboxes, dropdowns, and final contact details.
prompt: Go to mondula.com/msf-demo, complete each page, fill at least 6 input fields, and reach the submit-ready final step.
narration_script_text:
Ladies and gentlemen, fasten your seatbelts. We are about to make a web form feel exciting. Mondula is sleek, green, and suspiciously clean.

Accept those cookies, om nom nom, and blow past the intro. Hit Next Step and let's get to work.

Section one. Watch the fingers fly. Pavan Demo goes in, and the textarea becomes a tiny manifesto for automation.

Page two, and now we wait. Quick breather. Why do we mash dead remote batteries harder? Nobody knows.

Boom, we're back. Automation field, check. Second value, check. March thirteenth on the calendar. A fine day for destiny.

Next step, please. Loading takes its sweet time, like a cat deciding whether it actually wants to go outside.

And we're live. Radio buttons, checkboxes, dropdowns. A digital buffet, and we're sampling like professionals.

Now the conditional section opens, and the plot thickens. We choose pizza, because we are not monsters.

Thin crust, obviously. Olives and corn, bold choice. Pesto Rosso sauce, because we're fancy today.

One last wait. If you're still here, you're a champion. Data immortality is seconds away.

Final lap. Pavan Kumar goes in, birthday locked, phone, email, and production details all lined up. Big leagues only.

Grand finale. Review the summary. Everything looks perfect. We came, we automated. Mondula zero, Pavan one.
